sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110110" key="faino/pous" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φαινό-πους</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ποδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n110110.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with shining feet,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
